releases.summary: Fix AppShell desktop sidebar collapse/layout and web notification dismissal behavior.

audiences.summary: AppShell now keeps the desktop topbar inset beside the sidebar, exposes a shared sidebar collapse trigger, and dismisses the web notification panel on outside click, Escape, or trigger toggle.

commands: cd packages/libs/design-system && bun run typecheck && bun run lint:check
evidence: AppShell tests cover the shared sidebar provider, collapse trigger, notification trigger toggle, outside-click dismissal, and existing notification callbacks.

releases.summary: Fix FormSpec phone country-select rendering to remove duplicated country adornments.

audiences.summary: Split FormSpec phone fields now show one clear country selector instead of duplicating the flag and calling code beside the select.
Design-system phone country options now honor the configured flag/calling-code display parts, while the selected country control owns those adornments in select mode.

evidence: Regression test covers split phone country controls without duplicate external flag/calling-code adornments.
Phone helper test covers country option labels for full and compact display modes.
Runtime renderer tests confirm split phone output writes still work.
